content: Battle.net OAuth 2.0 is CONFIRMED viable for third-party apps. Blizzard has a developer portal at community.developer.battle.net. Basic OAuth (no scopes) returns user account ID and BattleTag. Additional scopes include wow.profile (WoW characters) and sc2.profile (StarCraft 2). There is NO dedicated WC3/Warcraft III OAuth scope. BattleTag is the primary identifier that matches what w3champions uses. Any third party can register an app at the Blizzard developer portal and use OAuth 2.0.
